HomeHero.title: PKT SWISS KART TEAM
HomeHero.subtitle: Passion, growth, competition and professionalism. From karting school to success on the track.

About.title: One team, one vision
About.lead1: Founded in 2016, PKT quickly grew from an amateur project into a professional team, entering the IAME X30 Italy championship and achieving significant results. Thanks to the passion of founder Stefano Matteuzzi and the dedication of the team, PKT now competes across multiple championships in a single season.
About.lead2: Our goal is to develop young drivers and help them compete at national and international level with professionalism, discipline, and elegance — supporting them every step of the way.
points: Since 2016: steady growth and results on track
Development path for young drivers and families

slides.title: Trackside support
slides.caption: Constant presence and technical support during tests and race weekends.

slides.title: Driver development
slides.caption: A growth journey: from karting school to national and international competitions.

slides.title: Method & discipline
slides.caption: Organization, attention to detail and teamwork for consistent performance.

History.title: Our story
History.lead: From the team's early days to consistent growth on track: a journey built on method, discipline and clear goals.

items.title: The team begins
items.desc: PKT – Power Kart Team is founded by Stefano Matteuzzi. First 18 races in the Kartsport Brianza championship: the beginning of everything.

items.title: IAME Series Italy
items.desc: The team enters the IAME Series Italy championship with X30 engines, raising the competitive level and establishing itself as a professional outfit.

items.title: Championships & drivers
items.desc: Participation in Italian championships and the WSK. The roster grows: Gaia Bernasconi, Christian Canonica, Erika Lavazza and Mattia Vischi among the drivers.

items.title: EasyKart & new strategy
items.desc: The team adopts a new approach, entering Birel's EasyKart championship. 3rd place in the BMB Challenge championship follows.

items.title: EasyKart Vice-Champion
items.desc: Mattia Vischi claims the Vice-Champion title at the 2024 International EasyKart Final: the team's highest result to date.

items.title: The year of success
items.desc: Return to major championships: IAME Series Italy, Rok Cup and Swiss Championship. 3rd place in IAME Italy Junior and Senior, 3rd in the Swiss Championship, with multiple podiums throughout the season.

items.title: New goals
items.desc: An ambitious programme: IAME Series Italy, regional championship and World Finals OKN, OKNJ and IAME IWF in Viterbo. The team keeps growing.

Services.title: Services
Services.lead: Full trackside support and development pathways designed for those who want to experience karting with a structured approach. From race logistics to the training of young drivers, the team supports you at every stage—with organization, attention to detail, and a clear goal: to improve weekend after weekend.

highlights.title: Trackside assistance
highlights.text: Vehicle setup, spare parts, coaching, and race weekend management.

highlights.title: Karting school
highlights.text: A guided path for kids and teens, from basics to first races.

highlights.title: Progression
highlights.text: Method, realistic goals and steady improvement race after race.

assistance.title: Assistance
assistance.lead: On race weekends, being ready makes all the difference. With our assistance service, we support you from preparation to on-track performance, handling set-up, checks, and operational management. Essential equipment is prepared by the team: you travel light and focus on driving and performance—no stress, no unnecessary load.
points: Full trackside support throughout the race weekend
Equipment and essentials already prepared by the team
Travel with peace of mind: you arrive and everything is ready
assistance.noteText: We reduce the organizational workload and increase the quality of your time on track: more focus, more consistency, better results.
assistance.highlightText: Organization, technical support, and everything you need already at the track: you just focus on driving.

trackside.miniLeftText: Helmet, gear, and anything you need to feel comfortable at the track.
trackside.miniRightText: Technical support, organization, and essential equipment already prepared by the team.

setup.singleText: We always work to deliver a kart that matches the driver's style, with high-quality technical support and winning partners.

logistica.miniLeftText: Everything is already at the track: tent, dedicated area and assigned pit space for each driver, with fully equipped vehicles to cover every weekend need.
logistica.miniRightText: An additional Hospitality area where families and guests can spend time together in comfort during race weekends.

trackside.highlightText: We prepare everything you need and support you at every stage: equipment always in order, 360° technical assistance, coaching with telemetry data analysis and video review with line selection to help you grow and improve consistently—reaching national and international-level results. The goal is simple: to let you race in the best possible conditions.
trackside.miniLeftText: Helmet, clothing and whatever you need to stay comfortable at the track.
trackside.miniRightText: Technical support, organisation and essential equipment already prepared by the team.

setup.highlightText: We take care of set-up and checks so you hit the track with a kart that's ready and consistent: inspections, adjustments and technical management to maximise performance, reducing unexpected issues and wasted time.
setup.miniLeftText: Your personal gear and whatever you prefer to have with you in the paddock.
setup.miniRightText: Checks, set-up, technical support and operational management throughout the weekend.

logistica.highlightText: We handle the organisational side of the weekend: preparation, coordination and continuous support. You travel light and focus on driving and performance—no stress and no unnecessary loads.
logistica.miniLeftText: You arrive light: personal gear and the essentials to stay comfortable.
logistica.miniRightText: Organisation, essential equipment and full support already prepared by the team.

kartingSchool.title: Karting School
kartingSchool.lead:
A dedicated path for kids and teens, designed to enter karting the right way: gradual onboarding, driving technique, good habits and steady progression.
From karting school to the first races, we support drivers and families with a clear method, realistic goals and track presence.
points: Start young and progress by age and category
kartingSchool.tipText: Every driver has different timing: we build a tailored path, keeping consistency and peace of mind for both driver and family.

CookieBanner.title: Cookies
CookieBanner.text: We use technical cookies required for the website to work. If we enable analytics or marketing cookies in the future, you'll be able to manage your preferences at any time.

CookieNotice.text: We only use essential technical cookies required for the website to work and to store preferences (e.g., language). For more information, see our Privacy Policy.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.lead: This notice explains how we process personal data when you browse the website.

controller.title: 1. Data Controller
controller.body: The Data Controller is PKT Swiss Kart Team. For requests or information, please contact us via the email address shown in the website footer.

data.title: 2. Data we process
items: Browsing data (e.g., IP address, device/browser information, access date and time, pages visited).
Technical preferences (e.g., selected language), stored via cookies or local browser storage.
The website does not perform profiling and, unless otherwise stated, does not collect data through forms.

purposes.title: 3. Purposes and legal basis
items: To provide and operate the website and its features (necessary for service delivery / legitimate interest).
To store technical preferences (e.g., language) to improve the browsing experience (strictly necessary).

cookies.title: 4. Cookies and storage
cookies.body: We only use strictly necessary technical cookies/storage required for the website to function (for example, language preference). We do not use marketing or profiling cookies. You can manage or delete cookies and stored data in your browser settings.

thirdParties.title: 5. Third-party services
thirdParties.body: To display content (e.g., images/documents), the website may use technical third-party services (e.g., Google Drive and related services). These providers may receive technical browsing data (e.g., IP address) necessary to deliver the content.

recipients.title: 6. Recipients
recipients.body: Data may be processed by technical providers (e.g., hosting, CDN, Google services) acting as processors where applicable.

transfers.title: 7. International transfers
transfers.body: Some providers may process data outside the European Economic Area. Where applicable, transfers take place in accordance with relevant safeguards (e.g., Standard Contractual Clauses).

retention.title: 8. Retention
retention.body: Technical data is retained only as long as necessary to operate and secure the website. Preferences remain stored until you delete them.

rights.title: 9. Your rights
rights.body: You can exercise your GDPR rights (Articles 15–22: access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction, portability) by contacting us using the details shown in the footer. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

updates.title: 10. Updates
updates.body: This notice may be updated. The version published on this page is the current one.
